name: Lagot Ka, Isusumbong Kita
overview: Lagot Ka... Isusumbong Kita! was a situational comedy television show in the Philippines aired every Monday evenings by GMA Network. The show was part of the network's GMA KiliTV block.

trailers.title: Lagot Ka, Isusumbong Kita: Ano’ng ibig sabihin ng ‘S’ sa dibdib ni Superman? | Episode 61
